faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in West Orange?
faqs.answer: West Orange properties most commonly experience issues with house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets. House crickets are attracted to warmth and often enter homes through small cracks, while camel crickets prefer damp basements and crawl spaces common in older West Orange homes.
